Open

Give feedback

If you need service **today in Pleasanton** , these companies advertise same-day or emergency garage door repair:

  * Valiant Garage Door — Offers same-day repair for springs, openers, cables, and emergency calls when scheduling and parts availability allow. Phone: (925) 409-4974. [Valiant Garage Door | Same-Day Repair, Springs & Openers](https://www.valiantdoor.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * Precision Garage Door Service — Advertises same-day repairs, appointments 7 days a week, and fully stocked service trucks. Phone: (925) 268-9267. [Garage Door Repair in Pleasanton, CA | Precision Garage Doors](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/pleasanton?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * Door King — Provides repair services and lists emergency availability. Phone: (925) 387-4404. [Door King | Expert Garage Door Services in Pleasanton, CA](https://www.rollupdoorssales.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * Same Day Garage Door Repair — Advertises same-day dispatch and 24/7 emergency service throughout the Bay Area, including Pleasanton. Phone: (925) 288-8368. [Same Day Garage Door Repair — 24/7 Bay Area Service](https://www.samedaygd.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

To get the fastest response, call and tell them:

  1. Whether the door is **stuck open** , **stuck closed** , **off-track** , or has a **broken spring**.

  2. Whether a vehicle is trapped inside.

  3. Your address and preferred arrival window.

If you'd like, I can also help you narrow it down based on the specific problem (broken spring, opener failure, cable issue, door off-track, etc.).
